_meta.template_name: Owens Corning TruDefinition Duration — Retail System

system_warranty.name: Platinum Protection Roofing System Limited Warranty
system_warranty.requirements: All Owens Corning components: shingles, starter, hip & ridge, plus at least one OC underlayment AND one OC ventilation product

_meta.base_price_includes: TruDefinition Duration shingles installed (material + labor). Excludes tear-off, underlayment, ice & water, drip edge, starter, ridge cap, ventilation, flashing, decking. Add those line items separately.
_meta.notes: All non-shingle line items use industry-typical retail unit prices. Override per-market or per-contractor as needed. Quantity formulas reference variables surfaced by the measurement parser (EagleView/HOVER/etc.): roof_area_sq, eave_lf, valley_lf, ridge_lf, hip_lf, rake_lf, pipe_count, etc.

items.description: Tear off existing composition shingles — single layer, dump fees included
Sheathing replacement — 1/2" CDX plywood, per 4x8 sheet (32 SF)
items.notes: Allowance — actual qty determined on tear-off. Bill T&M or per-sheet.

items.description: Owens Corning ProArmor Synthetic Underlayment — installed
items.notes: Required for Platinum Protection warranty. Substitute: OC Deck Defense ($28/SQ) for a budget tier.

items.description: Owens Corning WeatherLock Mat-G Granulated Self-Sealing Ice & Water Barrier — installed at eaves, valleys, around penetrations
items.notes: Quantity formula derives SF coverage from eave + valley LF (6 ft up from eave, 3 ft each side of valley), converted to squares. Match local code minimums.

items.description: Drip edge — aluminum, baked enamel finish, color-matched. Installed at eaves and rakes.
items.notes: Code-required in most jurisdictions per IRC R905.2.8.5.

items.description: Owens Corning Starter Strip Shingles — installed at eaves and rakes
items.notes: Required for Platinum Protection warranty. Pre-cut, factory sealant adhered.

items.description: Owens Corning TruDefinition Duration laminate shingles — installed (material + labor). Lifetime warranty, 130 mph wind, StreakGuard algae protection.
items.notes: Base retail price per Tom directive. 10% waste factor included. Color: customer's choice from current OC palette (Driftwood, Estate Gray, Onyx Black, etc.).

items.description: Owens Corning ProEdge Hip & Ridge Shingles — color-matched to field shingle
Owens Corning VentSure Strip Ridge Vent — installed continuously along main ridge
items.notes: Required for Platinum Protection warranty. Pairs with VentSure InFlow soffit intake (separate line item if needed).

items.description: Pipe boot — neoprene, retrofit/new, lead-free, color-matched cap. Standard 1-1/2" to 3" pipe.
items.notes: Upgrade to lead pipe flashing ($125/EA) for >25 yr life expectation.

items.description: Step flashing — new aluminum, installed at wall-to-roof intersections
items.notes: Code requires new step flashing — cannot reuse per IRC R905.2.8.3.

items.description: Counter flashing — surface-mount or reglet, masonry chimney/parapet sealing
items.notes: Chimney flashing kit (4-side reglet, cricket excluded): bill separately at $450/EA.

items.description: Contractor workmanship warranty — 10-year non-prorated coverage on labor and installation defects
items.notes: Included with system install. Disclose on contract.
Varies by jurisdiction. Adjust to actual municipal fee.

items.description: Dumpster rental + final cleanup (magnetic nail sweep)
items.notes: Cost rolled into tear-off line item. Itemized here for customer-facing transparency.

warranty_disclosure: To activate the Owens Corning Platinum Protection Roofing System Limited Warranty, ALL of the following components must be installed: (1) TruDefinition Duration shingles, (2) Owens Corning Starter Strip Shingles, (3) ProEdge Hip & Ridge Shingles, (4) one Owens Corning underlayment (ProArmor, Deck Defense, or RhinoRoof), (5) one Owens Corning ventilation product (VentSure or equivalent). Substituting any non-OC component voids the system warranty — only the shingle limited warranty remains.

suggested_substitutions.underlayment_budget: OC Deck Defense ($28/SQ) — meets warranty req, lower premium
suggested_substitutions.ice_water_budget: OC WeatherLock Self-Sealing Mat ($280/SQ smooth) — meets warranty req
suggested_substitutions.ice_water_premium: OC WeatherLock Mat-G ($320/SQ granulated) — better for exposed eaves
